JOSE ALBERTO REYES APPEARED FOR ORIENTATION ON MAY-08-2003

AFTER ARGUMENT & SUBMISSION THE COURT GRANTED FATHER'S REQUEST FOR CV. SUPERVISED EXCHANGES FOR COURT ORDERED CV WHEREIN RESPONDENT'S SISTER (LUCY REYES) SHALL P/U & D/O THE MINOR CHILDREN @ PETITIONER'S RESIDENCE. RESPONDENT'S CV SHALL COMMENCE SATURDAY, JULY 5, 2003, WITH SCHEDULE AS FOLLOWS: (1) EVERY SATURDAY FROM 9:00 A.M. TO 4:00 P.M. (2) EVERY SUNDAY FROM 9:00 A.M. TO 4:00 P.M. (3) EVERY MONDAY FROM 12:00 P.M. TO THE FOLLOWING TUESDAY @ 9:00 A.M. (4) EVERY WEDNESDAY FROM 11:00 A.M. TO 8:00 P.M. FURTHERMORE, THE COURT AWARDED PETITIONER TEMPORARY SOLE L/C & SOLE P/C OF THE MINORS, PENDING RESOLUTION OF THE TRO. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR #5208.
